appraisal_events.evidence: Au nom que lui cita le directeur, elle se contenta de détourner les yeux et eut l'air de ne pas voir Mme de Villeparisis qui, comprenant que la grand-mère ne tenait pas à faire de reconnaissances, regarda à son tour dans le vague.
appraisal_events.explanation: By the principle of incognito while traveling, the grandmother pretends not to recognize Mme de Villeparisis; the latter aligns at once. This refusal of recognition blocks the prestigious association that would have increased their visibility at the hotel.

status_effects.explanation: By refusing any recognition, she isolates herself socially and lets slip the prestige of association that the presence of Mme de Villeparisis offered her.
